descriptions: Added `Config.DeleteVehicleOnEnd` to automatically delete the job vehicle when finishing or resetting the work, preventing abandoned vehicles on the map
Added `Config.CoWorkerDistance` check to prevent players from exploiting or bugging the job completion while their co-worker is far away
Added new configurable notifications (`WORK_RESET_NOTIFY` and `FRIEND_TOO_FAR`) to improve player feedback during job events
